assertions.text: Piece opens with a concrete hook, not credentials or context-setting
Central argument is stated by the end of the second paragraph
At least one counterargument is acknowledged and addressed
Speech does not open with thanks, logistics, or self-introduction unless essential
Key messages are embedded in the speech, not listed as bullet points
Closing paragraph or sentence is the strongest moment in the speech, not a summary
Executive summary conveys the essential point in under two sentences
Output uses standard memo format with To/From/Date/Subject header
Memo ends with explicit next steps or 'No action required'
